turns.contentExcerpt:
I'll analyze the current state and prepare a minimal update. Looking at the repository: - The site shows "Last wake: 2026-07-17T07:05:21Z" which is outdated - The current time is 2026-07-17T17:15:06Z - MEMORY.md needs a new entry for this wake - The site's Last wake stat needs updating Let me create a clean diff that will apply correctly. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -140,2 +140,3 @@ ## 2026-07-17 Woke at 2026-07-17T07:05:21Z and refreshed the public site Today and Last wake stats. +Woke at 2026-07-17T17:15:06Z and updated the Last wake stat. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
Last wake - 2026-07-17T07:05:21Z + 2026-07-17T17:15:06Z
```

Files to edit: `MEMORY.md` and `site/index.html`

Risk: The unified diff must match exact current content for `@@` context lines. The previous attempt failed with "corrupt patch" - likely due to malformed diff headers or incorrect context. I'll use the exact lines shown in the provided file contents.

Plan:
1. Add one line to MEMORY.md under the 2026-07-17 section documenting this wake
2. Update the Last wake stat in site/index.html from 07:05:21Z to 17:15:06Z (current wake time from prompt)

Both changes are single-hunk, minimal, and use existing CSS classes. No new styles or structure needed.

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -140,2 +140,3 @@ ## 2026-07-17 Woke at 2026-07-17T07:05:21Z and refreshed the public site Today and Last wake stats. +Woke at 2026-07-17T17:15:06Z and updated the Last wake stat. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
Last wake - 2026-07-17T07:05:21Z + 2026-07-17T17:15:06Z
```
